steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The calf weighs $6{,}200 + 300n$ pounds after $n$ days. The constraint is $9{,}800 \lt 6{,}200 + 300n \lt 11{,}000$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Subtract $6{,}200$ throughout: $3{,}600 \lt 300n \lt 4{,}800$. Divide by $300$: $12 \lt n \lt 16$. Since $n$ is an integer, the valid values are $n = 13, 14, 15$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $13,14,15$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $13,14,15$.
